title: In Old Kentucky
writer: Marian Ainslee, Ruth Cummings, Charles T. Dazey
actors: James Murray, Helene Costello, Wesley Barry
plot: Young Brierly struggles to save his father, Major Brierly, from the clutches of alcohol after the Great War. At the same time, he prepares Major Brierly's horse, which served bravely with the Major at the front, for the Kentucky D...
